testcase.name: test_eleven_players
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_profile_tournament_v2.py:407: in test_eleven_players join_room(u["token"], room_a) backend/tests/test_profile_tournament_v2.py:87: in join_room assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"join_room {room_id}: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: join_room 6a253bccc3df1a932dc3ee65: 400 {"detail":"Room is full"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tournament_not_in_other_room
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_profile_tournament_v2.py:440: in test_tournament_not_in_other_room join_room(alice["token"], room_a) backend/tests/test_profile_tournament_v2.py:87: in join_room assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"join_room {room_id}: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: join_room 6a253bccc3df1a932dc3ee65: 400 {"detail":"Room is full"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
